Constituent notes — prepared by Angela Ruiz on June 3, 2025.

Met with Robert Castellano at his home in Santa Fe. Robert and his late
wife Elena Castellano have supported the annual fund since 2011. He
mentioned he is reviewing his estate plans with his attorney,
James Whitfield, and is considering a bequest.

Follow-up: email r.castellano88@gmail.com before July 10, 2025.
Secondary contact: daughter, Maria Castellano-Reyes, in Albuquerque,
phone (505) 555-0177.

Angela Ruiz noted Robert prefers phone calls over email.
